{{Quote|You are intruding on ''Ganathan Space''. You will accompany us to port… or you will be fired on and destroyed.|[[Ussor]], to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="DEII4" />}}
'''Ganathan Space''' was an area of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] near [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] that contained the [[Ganath system/Legends|Ganath system]]. It was surrounded by the [[Radiation/Legends|radioactive]] [[Oktos Nebula/Legends|Oktos Nebula]], which isolated it from the rest of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

{{Sec-stub}}
